title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind is reimagining the mouse pointer with AI-powered capabilities that understand what the pointer targets and its significance. The AI pointer represents an evolution of the static mouse pointer interface that has remained largely unchanged for over fifty years.
